meta_description: Connecting you with the best professional artisans in Morocco through a trusted digital platform.
about_mission_desc_1: We aim to empower local artisans by giving them the tools to grow their business while providing homeowners with a safe, reliable, and convenient way to get quality work done.
about_mission_desc_2: By combining traditional craftsmanship with modern technology, we're building a more transparent and efficient home services ecosystem in Morocco.
about_subtitle: M3allem En Click was born from a simple idea: connecting homeowners with the best professional artisans in Morocco through a trusted, digital platform.
about_values_community_desc: We support local talent and help build stronger professional communities.
about_values_customer_desc: Our users are at the heart of everything we do. We're here to help.
about_values_innovation_desc: We use technology to simplify complex processes and improve user experience.
about_values_quality_desc: We stand behind the quality of work provided by our professional network.
about_values_transparency_desc: Clear pricing, honest reviews, and open communication are our core.
about_values_trust_desc: We verify every artisan and homeowner to ensure a safe environment for everyone.

become_ar_desc: Join Morocco's largest network of verified professionals. Get more clients, manage your bookings, and build your reputation.
become_ar_faq_1_a: No, joining M3allem En Click is completely free. We only take a small commission on successful bookings.
become_ar_faq_2_a: Payments are processed through our secure system and transferred directly to your bank account or wallet.
become_ar_faq_3_a: You will need a valid National ID (CIN) and any professional certifications or licenses you have.
become_ar_faq_4_a: Yes! You have full control over your availability. You can work as much or as little as you want.
become_ar_process_1_desc: Fill out our simple application form with your details and expertise.
become_ar_process_2_desc: We review your documents and conduct a background check.
become_ar_process_3_desc: Once approved, your profile goes live and you can start accepting jobs.

pricing_trust_1_desc: What you see is what you pay. No subscription fees or surprise charges.
pricing_trust_2_desc: We use industry-standard encryption to keep your financial data safe.
pricing_trust_3_desc: If you're not satisfied with the service, we offer mediation and refunds.
privacy_sec1_desc: Welcome to M3allem En Click. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you about how we look after your personal data when you visit our website and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.
privacy_sec2_desc: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together as follows:
privacy_sec2_item1: Identity Data: includes first name, last name, username or similar identifier.
privacy_sec2_item2: Contact Data: includes email address and telephone numbers.
privacy_sec2_item3: Technical Data: includes internet protocol (IP) address, your login data, browser type and version.
privacy_sec2_item4: Profile Data: includes your username and password, bookings made by you, your interests, preferences, feedback and survey responses.
privacy_sec3_desc: We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances:
privacy_sec3_item1: Where we need to perform the contract we are about to enter into or have entered into with you.
privacy_sec3_item2: Where it is necessary for our legitimate interests and your interests and fundamental rights do not override those interests.
privacy_sec3_item3: Where we need to comply with a legal obligation.
privacy_sec4_desc: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered or disclosed. In addition, we limit access to your personal data to those employees, agents, contractors and other third parties who have a business need to know.
privacy_sec5_desc: Under certain circumstances, you have rights under data protection laws in relation to your personal data, including the right to request access, correction, erasure, restriction, transfer, to object to processing, to portability of data and (where the lawful ground of processing is consent) to withdraw consent.

terms_sec1_desc: By accessing or using M3allem En Click, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all the terms and conditions of this agreement, then you may not access the website or use any services.
terms_sec2_desc: M3allem En Click provides a marketplace connecting homeowners with professional artisans. We do not provide the services ourselves. We are a platform that facilitates the connection, booking, and payment between the two parties.
terms_sec3_desc: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account. You must be at least 18 years old to use this platform.
terms_sec4_desc: Payments are processed through our secure third-party provider. M3allem En Click takes a commission on successful bookings as specified in our pricing page. Artisans agree to receive payments minus the applicable commission.
terms_sec5_desc: M3allem En Click shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses.
